def positive_repeated_key_hash_via_dict_lookup_in_tight_loop():
    rule_id = "repeated_key_hash_via_dict_lookup_in_tight_loop"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Same dict key looked up repeatedly inside a loop; cache the value in a local variable."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
